data.body: AC amendment: Verify pytest discovery covers tests/unit/scripts/ — check pyproject.toml testpaths. If tests/unit/scripts/ is not in testpaths, move test file to tests/unit/test_figma_node_mapper.py where existing pytest infrastructure applies. Acceptance criteria must confirm: poetry run pytest tests/unit/test_figma_node_mapper.py (or the confirmed path) exits non-zero in RED state.
